signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly – Strongest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly – Strongest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in inflows this week, the highest since January 2026, led by Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA, driving ETH price up 7% to near $2,400 amid a broader market rally.[1]  
ETH now trades around $2,288, signaling renewed institutional demand confirmed via CoinDesk and
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg Drops Historic 45 Points in Mavericks' Win Over Lakers, Solidifying Rookie of the Year Case | YES | HIGH co
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Drops Historic 45 Points in Mavericks' Win Over Lakers, Solidifying Rookie of the Year Case | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3][5]

Cooper Flagg scored 45 points, 9 assists, and 8 rebounds in Dallas' 134-128 victory over the injury-depleted Lakers (missing Luka Dončić and Austin Reaves) on April 5, 2026, following his 51-point game against Orlando—marking the first rookie back-to-back
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
